xdust extinction¶

Extinction (scattering and absorption) is computed through the xdust.grainpop.SingleGrainPop class. After calling SingleGrainPop.calculate_ext(), the following optical depth arrays are populated:

  • tau_ext — total extinction optical depth

  • tau_sca — scattering optical depth

  • tau_abs — absorption optical depth

See astrodust.grainpop for full API details.

Supporting modules¶

  • astrodust.extinction.scatmodels
